summary:
Syncope during bathing in infants is due to vasovagal reflexes causing transient hypotension and bradycardia, not an allergic reaction. It should not be classified as a form of water-induced urticaria because it lacks the inflammatory skin manifestations characteristic of urticaria.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$
formatted_summary:

It should not be classified as a form of water-induced urticaria because it lacks the inflammatory skin manifestations characteristic of urticaria.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$. Answer choice: C
